narrative:
Vinton County has 8,015 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.0% of registrants.
